productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Suede Moccasin Navy Blue Casual Shoes
description: Suede moccasins designed for the cosmopolitan male from numero uno. Styled in cool sophisticated blue, cut a dash with this pair at any up-scale casual do. Wear it with stone washed denims, a casual open neck shirt and a stylish hide jacket. Upper Suede upper with easy slip-on style design Stitch detailing on the toe box for durability and style Branding on the midfoot region Outsole TPU outsole with circular lugs and suction points for grip and traction shoe care Wipe leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
